content.problemStatement:
Given a grid containing fresh oranges, rotten oranges, and empty cells, find the minimum time required for all fresh oranges to become rotten. Each rotten orange can rot its adjacent fresh oranges (up, down, left, right) in one second.


Input Format

First line contains TTT - the number of test cases
For each test case:

First line contains two integers NNN and MMM - dimensions of the grid
Next NNN lines each contain MMM integers - the grid values



0: Empty cell 

1: Fresh orange 

2: Rotten orange



Output Format

For each test case:

Print minimum time required to rot all oranges
Print -1 if it's impossible to rot all oranges
